title: Add Hunting to Recreation & Outdoors section

requirements.text: Add 'Hunting' as a recreation activity entry in the Recreation & Outdoors page (frontend/src/pages/RecreationPage.tsx), following the same card/section format used by existing activities (snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, etc.). Include a short description of hunting opportunities in the Jackman, Maine area and relevant bullet-point highlights (e.g., deer, moose, bear, upland bird seasons).

quotes: Add for one of the recreation titles, add hunting.

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Hunting' section/card appears on the Recreation & Outdoors page alongside existing activities.
The hunting entry includes a title, descriptive text, and bullet-point highlights consistent with other activity entries.
The visual style matches the existing Northern Maine theme (deep forest greens, slate grays, amber accents).
No existing recreation activities are removed or altered.

constraints: Do not modify backend data models or storage — this is a frontend-only content addition.
Match the existing card/section layout pattern used for other recreation activities in RecreationPage.tsx.
nonGoals: Adding hunting license or regulation information.
Adding a hunting-specific image or banner.
Modifying any other page outside of RecreationPage.tsx.
